top_signals.title: Gold Edges Higher as Traders Weigh Fragile Israel-Lebanon Truce
top_signals.summary: Gold inched higher after Israel and Lebanon agreed to a conditional ceasefire, a possible step toward resolving the wider Middle East conflict that’s upended global energy markets and raised inflation risks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Russia claims foreign spy agencies hacked officials' phones
top_signals.summary: In a statement, Russia's Federal Security Service (FSB) said it had uncovered what it described as a "large-scale operation" involving malicious software installed on the mobile devices of senior Russian officials.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US House votes for measure that would end Iran war, in blow to Trump - Reuters
top_signals.summary: US House votes for measure that would end Iran war, in blow to Trump  Reuters
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Banks Offload $1 Trillion Loan Risk to SRT Investors, IACPM Says
top_signals.summary: Banks had offloaded credit risk tied to more than €905 billion ($1 trillion) in loans as of the end of last year, up 26% from a year earlier, via the rapidly-growing market for significant risk transfers.

top_signals.title: Fuji Media’s real estate unit attracts ¥1 trillion bids
top_signals.summary: More than 15 firms submitted bids for Sankei Building last month, with several offers exceeding ¥1 trillion ($6.3 billion).
